stages.concept:
# Unit 033: 부정대명사 some, others - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **부정대명사 some, (the) others, each other, one another**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **Some** students enjoy reading, and **others** prefer sports.
> 어떤 학생들은 독서를 즐기고, 또 어떤 학생들은 스포츠를 좋아한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 전체 수가 정해지지 않은 상태에서, 일부는 **some**, 또 다른 일부는 **others**로 나타냅니다.

> **Some** students enjoy reading, and **others** prefer sports.
> 어떤 학생들은 독서를 즐기고, 또 어떤 학생들은 스포츠를 좋아한다.

> **Some** travelers took the train, and **others** rented a car.
> 어떤 여행자들은 기차를 탔고, 또 어떤 여행자들은 자동차를 빌렸다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 전체 수가 정해진 상태에서, 일부는 **some**, 나머지 전부는 **the others**로 나타냅니다.

> There are twelve eggs in the box.
> **Some** are brown, and **the others** are white.
> 어떤 것들은 갈색이고, 나머지 전부는 흰색이다. (갈색이 5개라면 흰색은 7개)

> Twenty people came to the party.
> **Some** were dancing, and **the others** were talking.
> 어떤 사람들은 춤을 추고 있었고, 나머지 사람들은 대화를 하고 있었다. (춤추는 사람이 8명이라면 대화하는 사람은 12명)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **둘** 사이에서 '서로'라고 표현할 때 **each other**를 사용합니다.

> Tom and Lisa trust **each other**.
> Tom과 Lisa는 서로 신뢰한다. (둘)

> The two brothers always help **each other** with homework.
> 그 두 형제는 항상 서로 숙제를 도와준다. (둘)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **셋 이상** 사이에서 '서로'라고 표현할 때 **one another**를 사용합니다.

> Amy, Ben, and Chris encouraged **one another** before the test.
> Amy, Ben, Chris는 시험 전에 서로 격려했다. (셋)

> The five team members supported **one another** throughout the project.
> 다섯 명의 팀원들이 프로젝트 내내 서로를 지지했다. (다섯)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 정리해 볼게요!

| 표현 | 뜻 | 사용 상황 |
|------|------|------|
| some ~ others | 어떤 ~들 ~ 또 어떤 ~들 | 일부와 또 다른 일부 (전체 수 불특정) |
| some ~ the others | 몇몇 ~ 나머지 전부 | 일부와 나머지 전부 (전체 수 정해짐) |
| each other | 서로 | 둘 사이 |
| one another | 서로 | 셋 이상 |
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 033: 부정대명사 some, others - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
교실에 많은 학생들이 있다. 어떤 학생들은 책을 읽고 또 어떤 학생들은 글을 쓴다.
There are many students in the classroom. Some are reading and (     ) are writing.
> **정답** others

---

**02.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
운동장에 스무 명의 아이들이 있다. 몇명은 야구를 하고 있고 그 나머지 아이들은 달리기를 하고 있다.
There are twenty kids on the field. Some are playing baseball and (     ) are running.
> **정답** the others

---

**03.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
어떤 사람들은 고양이를 좋아하고, 또 어떤 사람들은 좋아하지 않는다.
Some like cats, and (     ) don't.
> **정답** others

---

**04.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
방에 있는 네 명의 학생들은 서로 알고 있다.
The four students in the room know one (     ) .
> **정답** another

---

**05.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
어떤 꽃들은 빨강이고, 나머지 꽃들은 노랑이다. (정해진 수)
Some flowers are red, and (     ) are yellow.
> **정답** the others

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Some students like soccer, and the other like basketball.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** the other → others (또는 the others)

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Some songs are sad, and other are happy.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** other → others

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
We must help one other.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** one other → one another

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Some birds fly south, and the other stay here.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** the other → the others

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Some enjoy swimming, and other enjoy hiking.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** other → others

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
어떤 사람들은 아침형이고, 또 어떤 사람들은 저녁형이다.
Some are morning people, and are night people.
> **정답** others

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
열 명 중 몇명은 동의하고, 나머지는 반대한다.
Some of the ten agree, and disagree.
> **정답** the others

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
우리는 서로 도와야 한다.
We should help one .
> **정답** another

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
어떤 과목이 쉽고, 또 어떤 과목이 어렵다.
Some subjects are easy, and are difficult.
> **정답** others

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
다섯 명 중 몇명은 웃고 있고 나머지는 울고 있다.
Some of the five are laughing, and are crying.
> **정답** the others

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
어떤 나라는 크고, 또 어떤 나라는 작다.
countries are Some big and small others are
> **정답** Some / countries / are / big / and / others / are / small

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
우리는 서로 존중해야 한다.
respect another should We one
> **정답** We / should / respect / one / another

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
어떤 동물은 빠르고, 또 어떤 동물은 느리다.
slow animals fast and are are Some others
> **정답** Some / animals / are / fast / and / others / are / slow

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
몇명은 걷고, 나머지 전부는 버스를 탔다.
the bus the others walked Some took and
> **정답** Some / walked / and / the others / took / the / bus

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
어떤 책은 재미있고, 또 어떤 책은 지루하다.
boring interesting are Some books and are others
> **정답** Some / books / are / interesting / and / others / are / boring
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 033: 부정대명사 some, others - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
몇몇의 소문은 사실이고 다른 것들은 사실이 아니다.
_____________ stories are true, but ______________
are not.
The other - others
Some - another
Some - the others
Some - others
> **정답** Some - others

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
There are many balloons in the box. ______________
are red, ____________ are yellow, and
_____________ are green.
Some - others - others
Some - another - some
Some - another - others
Some - others - the others
> **정답** Some - others - the others

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
______________ children believe in Santa Claus. But,
_____________ don't believe in Santa Claus.
Some - the others
Some - other
Some - another
Some - others
> **정답** Some - others

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
In the basket there are ten oranges, two are
green, another are ripe
Some shoppers want receipts while others
don't ask for them.
Some people like sweet things, but others
don't.
Some teachers of this school are female, the
others are male.
• receipt 영수증
> **정답** In the basket there are ten oranges, two are green, another are ripe

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Fifteen students are here. Some of them are
studying, the other are sleeping.
There are six classrooms. Some have windows
but the others have no windows.
Some students like English, others like math.
Of these books, some are new, the others are
old.
> **정답** Fifteen students are here. Some of them are studying, the other are sleeping.

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He has many friends. ____________ are from school,
________________ are from a soccer club.
Some - another
Others - the others
Some - the other
Some - others
> **정답** Some - others

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
There are ten letters in the mail box.
_______________ are for me, _______________ are
for dad, and ________________ for mom.
some - others - others
some - the others - others
some - others - the others
the others - another - others
> **정답** some - others - the others

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Fifteen boys are here. ______________ are on the
baseball team and ___________________ are on the
soccer team.
Others - the others
Some - another
Some - the others
Some - the other
> **정답** Some - the others

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Of four drinks, one was coke, another was
milk, and the others were juice.
Between these two books, I like this one
because the other is too boring.
There were many guests in the party. Some
are adults and another are children.
Some people eat chicken, but the others eat fish.
> **정답** Some people eat chicken, but the others eat fish., There were many guests in the party. Some are adults and another are children.

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Tom, Jake, and Lisa knew each other for
over 10 years.
Amy and I are best friends. We trust each
other.
Some teachers are from England, the others
are from American.
Tom received some letters. One was from his
friend, others were from his grandma.
> **정답** Some teachers are from England, the others are from American., Tom, Jake, and Lisa knew each other for over 10 years.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
어떤 사람들은 댄스뮤직을 좋아하고 또 어떤 사람들은
힙합뮤직을 좋아한다.
Some people like dance music and another
like hip-hop music.
Some people like dance music and the others
like hip-hop music.
Some people likes dance music and others
like hip-hop music.
Some people like dance music and others like
hip-hop music.
> **정답** Some people like dance music and others like hip- hop music.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 여섯 잔의 차를 주문했다. 몇 개는 뜨거웠고, 그
나머지는 차가웠다.
Tom ordered six cups of tea. Others were hot
and the others were cold.
Tom ordered six cups of tea. Some were hot
and others were cold.
Tom ordered six cups of tea. Some were hot
and the others were cold.
Tom ordered six cups of tea. The others were
hot and others were cold.
> **정답** Tom ordered six cups of tea. Some were hot and the others were cold.

---

**13.** 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오
우리 반에 20명의 학생들이 있습니다. 몇몇의 학생들은 중
국어를 공부하고 그 나머지 학생들은 스페인어를 공부합니
다.
There are 20 students in our class. (     )
students study Chinese and (     ) study
Spanish.
> **정답** ① Some ② the others

---

**14.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom and Amy help one another to finish
their homework.
Some mothers go to work, and others take
care of their children.
Some children like soccer and others like
baseball.
Because they're busy, these five members
don't see one another very often.
> **정답** Tom and Amy help one another to finish their homework.

---

**15.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Some people take the elevator while others
use stairs.
A boy and a girl in the movie were looking at
each other.
There are a lot of apps on my cell phone.
Some are useful while the others aren't.
The three people thanked each other for
support.
> **정답** The three people thanked each other for support.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
These two businessmen did not
believe one another.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** one another. → each other

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The coach told his team
members to discuss with each
other about the project.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** each other → one another

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Some people like spicy food,
but another don 't.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** another → others

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
Ten students gathered to play sports. They knew
each other . Some played soccer and
another played basketball. They all ate
ice cream after they played.
> **정답** one another, Some, the others (others)

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
My brother and I went to a library to borrow books.
There were a lot of books. Some were fiction
and the others were non-fiction. My brother
and I picked up the adventure novel at the same
time. We looked at one another and smiled.
> **정답** Some, others, each other
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 033 부정대명사 some, others중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
어떤 사람들은 물에서 수영을 하고 있고, 다른 사람들은 모
래 위에서 놀고 있다.
 people are swimming in the water, 
are playing on the sand.
정답 Some, others

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
학생들은 서로에게서 배웁니다.
The students learn from  (     )   (     ) .
정답 one, another

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
10명의 소녀가 그 모임에 참석했다. 그 소녀들 중 일부는
미국인이었고 나머지는 영국인이었다.
Ten girls attended the meeting.  (     )  of the girls
were American and  (     )   (     )  were British.
정답 Some, the, others

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (부정대명사 추가)
어떤 학생들은 영어를 좋아하고, 어떤 학생들은 수학을 좋
아한다.
힌트 (     ) like, English, math
 students like  (     ) , and  (     )  
.
정답 Some, English, others, like, math

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (부정대명사 추가)
어떤 관광객들은 호텔에 머물렀고 다른 관광객들은 쇼핑을
갔다.
힌트 (     ) go shopping
 tourists stayed at hotels and  (     )  
.
정답 Some, others, went, shopping

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (부정대명사 추가)
Amy와 그녀의 친구는 항상 서로를 응원한다. [always,
support]
Amy and her friend  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 always, support, each, other

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (부정대명사 추가)
chat, study
A: What are the students in this classroom doing?
B:  (     )  are  (     )  and  (     )   (     )  are  (     ) .
정답 Some, chatting, the, others, studying

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (부정대명사 추가)
have a fight
A: What happened to these two? They don't talk these
days.
B: They  (     )   (     )   (     )  and didn't talk to
  (     ) .
정답 had, a, fight, each, other

---

**09.** 글을 읽고 빈칸에 부정대명사를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
some, each other, others
My brother and I saw a lot of movies on the weekend.
 of them had happy endings and  (     )  had
sad endings. After the movies, we talk to
 about each movie.
정답 Some, others, each other

---

**10.** 글을 읽고 빈칸에 부정대명사를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
every, one another, others, some
 worker of this store is kind.  (     )  help
customers find products, and  (     )  explain about
products. They also help  (     )  all the
time.
정답 Every, Some, others, one another

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 033: 부정대명사 some, others - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
몇몇의 이야기는 재미있고 다른 것들은 재미없다. _____________ stories are fun, but ______________ are not.
The other - others Some - another Some - the others Some - others
> 정답: Some - others

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
There are many pencils in the box. ______________ are red, ____________ are blue, and _____________ are green.
Some - others - others Some - another - some Some - another - others Some - others - the others
> 정답: Some - others - the others

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______________ students like reading books.
But, _____________ don't like reading books.
Some - the others Some - other Some - another Some - others
> 정답: Some - others

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
In the bag there are ten marbles, two are blue, another are red Some players want water while others don't ask for it.
Some people like cold weather, but others don't.
Some workers of this company are from Korea, the others are from Japan.
> 정답: In the bag there are ten marbles, two are blue,

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Twenty students are here.
Some of them are reading, the other are playing.
There are eight rooms.
Some have beds but the others have no beds.
Some children like math, others like art.
Of these toys, some are new, the others are old.
> 정답: Twenty students are here. Some of them are studying, the other are sleeping.

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She has many books. ____________ are from the library, ________________ are from the bookstore.
Some - another Others - the others Some - the other Some - others
> 정답: Some - others

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
There are twelve cupcakes on the table.
_______________ are for me, _______________ are for my sister, and ________________ for my brother. some - others - others some - the others - others some - others - the others the others - another - others
> 정답: some - others - the others

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Twenty children are here. ______________ are in the art club and ___________________ are in the music club.
Others - the others Some - another Some - the others Some - the other
> 정답: Some - the others

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Of four snacks, one was a cookie, another was a donut, and the others were bread.
Between these two shirts, I like this one because the other is too big.
There were many guests at the birthday party.
Some are children and another are adults.
Some students eat lunch, but the others eat a snack.
> 정답: Some students eat lunch, but the others eat a snack., There

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy, Tom, and Lily knew each other for over five years.
Jake and I are close friends.
We help each other.
Some players are from Busan, the others are from Daegu., One was from his friend, others were from his uncle. from Daegu.
Ben received some gifts.
One was from his friend, others were from his uncle.
> 정답: Some players are from Busan, the others are from Daegu., One was from his friend, others were from his uncle.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
어떤 사람들은 팝 음악을 좋아하고 또 어떤 사람들은 클래식 음악을 좋아한다.
Some people like pop music and another like classical music.
Some people like pop music and the others like classical music.
Some people likes pop music and others like classical music.
Some people like pop music and others like classical music.
> 정답: Some people like pop music and others like classical

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Mia는 여섯 장의 카드를 받았다. 몇 개는 예뻤고, 그 나머지는 평범했다.
Mia received six cards.
Others were pretty and the others were plain.
Mia received six cards.
Some were pretty and others were plain.
Mia received six cards.
Some were pretty and the others were plain.
Mia received six cards.
The others were pretty and others were plain.
> 정답: Mia received six cards. Some were pretty and the and the others were cold.

---

**13.** 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오 우리 반에 30명의 학생들이 있습니다. 몇몇의 학생들은 일본어를 공부하고 그 나머지 학생들은 프랑스어를 공부합니다. There are 30 students in our class. ? students study Japanese and ? study French.
> 정답: ① Some ② the others

---

**14.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom and Sora help one another to clean the classroom.
Some fathers drive to work, and others take the bus.
Some boys like basketball and others like baseball.
Because they're busy, these five students don't see one another very often.
> 정답: Tom and Sora help one another to clean the homework.

---

**15.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Some students take the stairs while others use the elevator.
A boy and a girl in the story were looking at each other.
There are a lot of games on my tablet.
Some are exciting while the others aren't.
The three friends thanked each other for the help.
> 정답: The three friends thanked each other for the help.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. These  two  classmates  did  not  trust  one  another. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: one another. → each other

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  captain  told  his  team  members  to  talk  with  each other  about  the  game. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: each other → one another

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Some  children  like  sweet  food, but  another  don  't. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: another → others

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Twelve students gathered to play games.
They knew each other .
Some played card games and another played board games.
They all ate snacks after they played.
> 정답: one another, Some, the others (others)

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
My brother and I went to a bookstore to buy books.
There were a lot of books.
Some were comic books and the others were novels.
My brother and I picked up the same book at the same time.
We looked at one another and laughed.
> 정답: Some, others, each other
